intro: Gerascanthus haenkeanus, also known as Haenke's coral tree, is a flowering plant species native to the Philippines. Studies have shown that the plant possesses various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. The bioactive constituents of Gerascanthus haenkeanus include flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
